title: T-067 — Docs: TEC-045 Lab Results Log prototype gap brief
prompt: Write engineering brief for missing TEC-045 'Lab Results Log' prototype per §10.7 [NO-PROTOTYPE-YET]. Output: design/specs/TEC-045-lab-results-log.md covering filterable table (item / WO / test_type / result_status), add-result modal, and ATP RLU pass/fail visualisation (threshold ≤10 RLU per §10.6). Cross-link to T-020 backend. Until prototype lands, T3-ui implementation is OUT OF SCOPE for Phase 1.

pipeline_inputs.details: Specify table columns, filter chips, ATP visualisation (numeric vs threshold gauge), add-result modal field set, and pass/fail color tokens.
acceptance_criteria: Given the brief, when reviewed, then table columns, filters, and ATP visualisation are documented.
Given the brief, when read by a designer, then it is sufficient to produce a labelled prototype.
risk_red_lines: Do not embed real lab data in the doc.
